name: Springle Puzzle
description: Springle Puzzle is a fun and fast jigsaw game where you solve puzzles before time runs out. Choose your puzzle style—Classic, Irregular, Hexagon, or Wave—each offering a unique way to play. Play with 16 pieces for a quick game or 32 pieces for a bigger challenge and higher score. Need more time? Just watch a reward ad and keep playing without limits!
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to drag the piece and join it to another
